key_findings: AUROC=1.0: commit-onset timing is a perfect discriminator for final AND-frac (committed vs not)
Low detection rate (2%): mock AND-frac peaks at ~0.41, rarely reaches threshold=0.65
Implication: with real Whisper, lower threshold (0.35-0.45) likely needed for practical streaming
Short utterances have highest AND-frac (0.41 avg) — faster convergence
streaming_and_frac tracks full_and_frac exactly (corr=1.0): partial window is consistent
next_steps: Run on real Whisper-base to calibrate threshold from data distribution
Sweep threshold 0.2-0.7 to find optimal Pareto of detection_rate vs latency
Test with actual partial audio (zero-padded) rather than attention sub-matrices
